headline: 2 Reasons to Watch MRK and 1 to Stay Cautious
summary: Merck has had an impressive run over the past six months as its shares have beaten the S&P 500 by 6.8%. The stock now trades at $113.99, marking a 20% gain. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: Merck Receives Positive EU CHMP Opinion for KEYTRUDA® (pembrolizumab) Plus Padcev® (enfortumab vedotin-ejfv) as Perioperative Treatment for Adults With Cisplatin-Ineligible Resectable Muscle-Invasive Bladder Cancer
summary: RAHWAY, N.J., May 22, 2026--Merck (NYSE: MRK), known as MSD outside of the United States and Canada, today announced the European Medicines Agency’s Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) adopted a positive opinion recommending approval of KEYTRUDA® (pembrolizumab), Merck’s anti-PD-1 therapy, in combination with Padcev® (enfortumab vedotin-ejfv), an antibody-drug conjugate (ADC), as neoadjuvant treatment and then continued after radical cystectomy as adjuvant treatment, for adults

content.title: Merck Receives Positive EU CHMP Opinion for KEYTRUDA® (pembrolizumab) Plus Padcev® (enfortumab vedotin-ejfv) as Perioperative Treatment for Adults With Cisplatin-Ineligible Resectable Muscle-Invasive Bladder Cancer
content.summary: RAHWAY, N.J., May 22, 2026--Merck (NYSE: MRK), known as MSD outside of the United States and Canada, today announced the European Medicines Agency’s Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) adopted a positive opinion recommending approval of KEYTRUDA® (pembrolizumab), Merck’s anti-PD-1 therapy, in combination with Padcev® (enfortumab vedotin-ejfv), an antibody-drug conjugate (ADC), as neoadjuvant treatment and then continued after radical cystectomy as adjuvant treatment, for adults

headline: 3 Stocks That May Be Trading Below Their Estimated Value In May 2026
summary: The United States market has experienced a flat week but has shown significant growth over the past year with a 27% increase, and earnings are anticipated to grow by 17% annually. In this context, identifying stocks that may be trading below their estimated value can offer opportunities for investors seeking to capitalize on potential future gains.
